findings.description: In the HTML version, some degree symbols and coordinate values in section 1.a.i for Dough Creek appear to have special/non-breaking space characters (displayed as boxes) instead of the proper degree symbol formatting
findings.evidence: PDF shows '35° 54.7103' N - 75° 40.0951' W' clearly, HTML shows '35⬜ 54.7103' N - 75⬜ 40.0951' W' with box characters replacing spaces near degree symbols

findings.description: In section 12.c, the HTML version shows degree coordinates with box/special characters instead of proper degree symbols
findings.evidence: PDF shows '34° 42.4694' N - 76° 58.3754' W' clearly, HTML shows '34⬜ 42.4694' N - 76⬜ 58.3754' W' with box characters

findings.description: Duplicate <main> tags in the HTML structure
findings.evidence: The HTML contains nested <main> elements: an outer <main> from the template and an inner <main> containing the actual content. This is an HTML structural issue but does not affect content fidelity.

findings.description: Missing degree symbols in Dough Creek coordinates for the canal crossing line
findings.evidence: PDF: '35° 54.7103' N - 75° 40.0951' W' with degree symbols. HTML: '35 54.7103' N - 75 40.0951' W' without degree symbols. This matches the source PDF which also appears to lack degree symbols for these specific coordinates in the original text.

findings.description: Missing degree symbols in Sanders Creek coordinates
findings.evidence: PDF: '34 42.4694' N - 76 58.3754' W' and '34 42.4903' N - 76 58.1434' W'. HTML matches this - both lack degree symbols, consistent with the source PDF text.
